ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the award belongs */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for winning the award */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the award (e.g., annually, biennially) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "year_of_graduation" INTEGER /* Year of graduation of the recipient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the recipient at the time of receiving the award */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the recipient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_year_of_graduation FOREIGN KEY ("year_of_graduation") REFERENCES graduation_years ("graduation_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipients" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "reason_for_recognition" TEXT /* Reason for recognition */,
  "award_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date of nomination */,
  "awarded_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity that awarded the recipient */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id", "recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipients_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES award_years ("award_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_years" (
  "graduation_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation year */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Graduation year */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the recipient graduated */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_years" (
  "award_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award year */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Award year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
